Input / Action: Buksan ang /login gamit ang valid user email at password, i-click Sign In
Output: Redirect sa Home (/). JWT naka-save. User profile (name, email, location) visible.
Notes: Gumamit ng active subaccount user (role=user). Test sa app.nolasmspro.com o production URL.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /login, ilagay ang maling password, i-click Sign In
Output: Error message: Invalid email or password. Hindi mag-redirect sa dashboard.
Notes: Hindi dapat ma-reveal kung email o password ang mali.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /login, iwanang blank ang email o password, i-click Sign In
Output: Validation error. Hindi mag-submit ang form.

Input / Action: Mag-login gamit ang deactivated user account
Output: Error: account deactivated (403). Hindi makapasok sa app.
Notes: Kailangan deactivated test account mula sa admin.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /register-from-install na may valid install_token mula sa GHL Marketplace install
Output: Registration form lumabas. Pagkatapos mag-register: auto-login at redirect sa dashboard.
Notes: Sundin ang GHL install flow o gamitin ang test install link.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /register-from-install na walang install_token
Output: Error: Install token is required. Hindi makapag-register.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /register-from-install na may expired/invalid install_token
Output: Error: token invalid or expired. Prompt na mag-reinstall mula sa GHL Marketplace.

Input / Action: Mag-login mula sa install-login.php (GHL install welcome flow)
Output: Successful login → redirect sa auth-handoff.html → React app na may valid session.
Notes: Test pagkatapos ng fresh GHL app install.

Input / Action: Buksan ang /forgot-password, ilagay ang registered email, i-submit
Output: OTP na-send sa email. Lumabas ang OTP verification step.

Input / Action: Sa forgot-password: ilagay ang tamang OTP, mag-set ng bagong password
Output: Password successfully updated. Pwede mag-login gamit ang bagong password.

Input / Action: Sa forgot-password: ilagay ang maling OTP
Output: Error message. Hindi makapag-proceed sa password reset step.

Input / Action: Buksan ang protected route (/) nang walang login session
Output: Redirect sa /login.

Input / Action: Mag-logout mula sa user dashboard
Output: Redirect sa /login. Session cleared. Hindi ma-access ang protected routes.

Input / Action: Buksan ang app na may ?token= sa URL (GHL iframe handoff)
Output: Token na-save sa session. URL na-clean (walang token sa address bar). User authenticated.

Input / Action: Mag-login at i-verify ang sidebar/menu navigation
Output: Lahat ng menu items visible: Home, Compose, Contacts, Templates, Tickets, Settings.

Input / Action: I-click ang bawat menu item
Output: Tamang page/route ang na-load: /, /compose, /contacts, /templates, /tickets, /settings.

Input / Action: I-toggle ang Dark Mode (top-right button, desktop)
Output: UI lumipat sa dark theme. Preference na-save (refresh → same theme).

Input / Action: I-toggle ang Dark Mode sa mobile view
Output: Dark mode gumagana sa mobile. Mobile menu bukas/sarado nang tama.
Notes: Test sa phone o responsive mode.

Input / Action: I-refresh ang page habang naka-login
Output: User nananatiling logged in. Same page/view ang na-restore.

Input / Action: Buksan ang unknown route (hal. /xyz)
Output: Redirect sa Home (/).

Input / Action: Mag-login at buksan ang Home (/),
Output: Dashboard stats/cards naglo-load. Credit balance at recent activity visible.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS mula sa Compose, bumalik sa Home
Output: Home stats na-update (sent today, credits used).

Input / Action: Buksan ang Home na may zero credits
Output: Low balance warning o indicator visible.
Notes: Gamitin ang account na walang credits.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa /compose, magpadala ng single SMS sa valid PH number (09XXXXXXXXX)
Output: Message sent successfully. Status: Sending → Sent. 1 credit deducted.
Notes: Test number: valid PH mobile format.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS sa invalid number format (hal. 123, +1-555)
Output: Validation error. Hindi ma-send ang message.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS na walang message body
Output: Validation error. Hindi ma-send.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS na 160+ characters (long message)
Output: Message sent. Multiple credits deducted kung multi-segment. Character/segment count visible.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng bulk SMS sa multiple recipients
Output: Bulk campaign created. Per-recipient status visible. Tamang credit deduction.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS gamit ang system default sender (NOLASMSPro)
Output: Message sent gamit ang default sender ID. Free tier counter nag-increment (kung applicable).
Notes: Check Settings → Sender IDs free usage count.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS gamit ang approved custom sender ID
Output: Message sent gamit ang approved sender. Tamang sender name sa outbound message.
Notes: Kailangan approved sender ID sa account.

Input / Action: Subukan magpadala gamit ang pending/rejected sender ID
Output: Sender ID hindi available sa dropdown o blocked sa send.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS kapag zero credits at wala nang free trial
Output: Error: insufficient credits. Hindi ma-send.

Input / Action: Mag-insert ng SMS template sa Compose
Output: Template content na-fill sa message field.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS na may special characters (hal. <3, em dash, smart quotes)
Output: Message body preserved correctly. Hindi na-truncate ang content.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS mula sa GHL embedded iframe (subaccount view)
Output: SMS sent successfully. Location ID auto-detected mula sa GHL context.

Input / Action: Buksan ang conversation list sa Home o Compose
Output: List ng conversations naglo-load. Sorted by latest message.

Input / Action: I-click ang isang conversation
Output: Message thread naglo-load. Outbound at inbound messages visible.

Input / Action: I-rename ang conversation
Output: New name na-save at visible sa list.

Input / Action: I-delete ang conversation
Output: Conversation removed from list. Messages deleted.

Input / Action: Tingnan ang message delivery status
Output: Status map tama: Sending / Sent / Failed.

Input / Action: Buksan ang bulk campaign conversation
Output: Per-recipient messages at statuses visible. Hindi nag-mix ang ibang contacts.

Input / Action: Mag-reply sa inbound SMS (kung supported sa UI)
Output: Reply sent. Lumabas sa same conversation thread.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa /contacts
Output: Contact list naglo-load para sa current location.

Input / Action: Mag-add ng bagong contact (name, phone, email)
Output: Contact na-save at lumabas sa list.

Input / Action: Mag-add ng contact na walang phone number
Output: Validation error. Hindi ma-save.

Input / Action: Mag-add ng contact na duplicate phone number
Output: Appropriate handling (error o update prompt).

Input / Action: I-search/filter ang contacts
Output: Tamang contacts ang lumalabas base sa search.

Input / Action: Pumili ng contact at gamitin sa Compose
Output: Contact phone auto-filled sa recipient field.

Input / Action: I-verify na contacts scoped per location
Output: Contacts ng Location A hindi visible sa Location B.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa /templates
Output: Template list naglo-load.

Input / Action: Gumawa ng bagong template (name + content + category)
Output: Template na-save at lumabas sa list.

Input / Action: Gumawa ng template na walang name o content
Output: Validation error. Hindi ma-save.

Input / Action: I-edit ang existing template
Output: Changes na-save. Updated timestamp refreshed.

Input / Action: I-delete ang template
Output: Template removed from list. Hindi na available sa Compose.

Input / Action: Gumamit ng template sa Compose page
Output: Template content na-apply sa message field.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa /tickets
Output: Support tickets page naglo-load.
Notes: Verify kung may existing ticket UI/feature.

Input / Action: Gumawa ng bagong support ticket (kung available)
Output: Ticket na-submit. Confirmation message visible.

Input / Action: Tingnan ang ticket status/history
Output: Submitted tickets at statuses visible.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa Settings → Account tab
Output: Profile info visible: Full Name, Email, Phone, Location Name, GHL Location ID.

Input / Action: I-verify ang workspace status banner
Output: Status badge tama: Approved / Pending / Rejected.

Input / Action: Sa standalone app (hindi GHL iframe): i-paste ang valid GHL Location ID, i-click Save
Output: Location name auto-fetched. Profile fields na-update.

Input / Action: Sa standalone app: i-paste ang invalid Location ID, i-click Save
Output: Location Not Found o error state. Hindi ma-corrupt ang existing data.

Input / Action: I-click ang Reset To Default (standalone)
Output: Location ID na-reset sa URL/context default. Profile re-fetched.

Input / Action: Sa GHL iframe: i-verify ang auto-detected Location ID
Output: Location ID read-only. Auto-synced mula sa GHL context.

Input / Action: I-click ang Connect GHL button (standalone, outside iframe)
Output: Redirect sa GHL OAuth location chooser.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa Settings → Sender IDs tab
Output: System default sender (NOLASMSPro) visible. Approved/pending requests listed.

Input / Action: I-click Request New → fill Sender Name (max 11 chars), Purpose, Sample Message → Submit
Output: Request submitted. Status: Pending. Lumabas sa list.

Input / Action: Mag-request ng sender ID na may invalid format (spaces, >11 chars, special chars)
Output: Validation error. Hindi ma-submit.

Input / Action: I-hover at i-click Set as Default sa approved sender
Output: Sender marked as Default Sender. Ginagamit sa susunod na Compose send.

Input / Action: I-verify ang free tier counter sa system default sender
Output: Shows X/10 Free usage count. Counter nag-increment pag nag-send gamit default.

Input / Action: Buksan ang Sender IDs mula sa Compose (auto-open modal)
Output: Request New modal auto-opens.
Notes: Trigger mula sa Compose kapag walang approved sender.

Input / Action: Pumunta sa Settings → Notifications tab
Output: 3 toggles visible: SMS Delivery Reports, Low Balance Alert, Marketing & Updates.

Input / Action: I-toggle ON ang Low Balance Alert, i-adjust ang threshold slider, i-click Save Changes
Output: Settings saved. Saved! confirmation. Threshold value persisted after refresh.

Input / Action: I-toggle OFF ang lahat ng notifications, i-save
Output: All toggles OFF after refresh.

Input / Action: I-toggle ON ang SMS Delivery Reports, magpadala ng SMS na mag-fail
Output: Delivery failure notification received (kung naka-configure ang GHL alert bridge).

Input / Action: Pumunta sa Settings → Credits tab
Output: Credit balance card naglo-load. Stats: Sent Today, Credits Used Today, This Month.

Input / Action: I-click ang Refresh button sa balance card
Output: Balance at stats na-reload. Hindi mag-reset to 0 kapag failed ang request.
Notes: Important: failed refresh dapat hindi mag-overwrite ng last good balance.

Input / Action: I-enable ang Auto Recharge, piliin ang amount at threshold, i-click Save
Output: Auto-recharge settings saved. Saved! confirmation.

Input / Action: I-click Request Credits → piliin ang amount (hal. 100) + optional note → Send Request
Output: Request Sent! confirmation. Agency receives credit request.

Input / Action: I-click Buy Credits (Top Up) → piliin ang package → i-submit
Output: Checkout popup window opens. Pre-filled name/email/phone/location_id.

Input / Action: Kumpletuhin ang checkout payment sa popup
Output: Payment success message. Credit balance auto-refreshes. Transaction lumabas sa ledger.

Input / Action: I-block ang popup at subukan mag-Top Up
Output: Alert: popup blocked. Option to retry/refresh visible.

Input / Action: I-filter ang transactions by month
Output: Tamang transactions para sa selected month.

Input / Action: I-click Download Report sa transaction ledger
Output: PDF/monthly report na-generate at na-download.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS → tingnan ang transaction ledger
Output: Debit entry lumabas: −1 credit (o tamang amount). Balance_after tama.

Input / Action: I-verify ang free trial progress bar (kung active trial)
Output: Trial bar shows used/total. Badge shows remaining free credits.

Input / Action: Buksan ang app mula sa GHL subaccount (embedded iframe)
Output: App loads inside iframe. Location ID auto-detected. No manual Location ID input needed.

Input / Action: Buksan ang app sa standalone browser (app.nolasmspro.com)
Output: Manual Location ID input available sa Settings. Connect GHL button visible.

Input / Action: Kumpletuhin ang GHL OAuth callback (/oauth/callback)
Output: OAuth completes. User redirected to dashboard with valid session.

Input / Action: Magpadala ng SMS via GHL Workflow action
Output: SMS delivered. Message synced back to GHL Conversations.

Input / Action: Tanggapin ang inbound SMS sa registered number
Output: Inbound message appears sa NOLA inbox/conversation.

Input / Action: Subukan i-access ang ibang location's data gamit ang tamang user token
Output: 403 Permission denied. Hindi ma-access ang ibang location data.
Notes: Tamper X-GHL-Location-ID header kung manual API test.

Input / Action: Subukan i-access ang API endpoints nang walang auth token
Output: 401 Unauthorized. Hindi ma-load ang data.

Input / Action: Buksan ang app habang naka-maintenance mode (admin enabled)
Output: 503 error o maintenance message. Hindi makapag-send ng SMS.
Notes: Kailangan i-enable ang maintenance mode sa admin.

Input / Action: Mag-login → i-expire ang JWT (simulate) → i-refresh ang page
Output: Redirect sa login. Hindi ma-access ang protected data.

Input / Action: Test sa whitelabel/custom domain (kung applicable)
Output: App loads. API calls successful (CORS allowed). Billing/credits data loads.
